messages.content: Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'In the background people appear to be selecting from a buffet, while in the foreground a young man smiles, seated before an empty plate that rests on a table with glassware, while close to him rests a full plate and a hand with a devise in it.'.

2. Subject: people | Relation: appear | Object: in the background

5. Subject: an empty plate | Relation: rests on | Object: a table with glassware
6. Subject: a young man | Relation: is seated | Object: before an empty plate
7. Subject: a full plate | Relation: rests | Object: close to him
8. Subject: a hand | Relation: rests with | Object: a device in it
